summary: Comprehensive testing of ADJ KILLAGAIN IA 2.0 application - code generation platform with AI. Backend APIs (100% passing): authentication, projects, scraper, voice commands. Frontend (95% working): login, home, create project, quick create, web scraper, voice assistant pages all functional.

minor.issue: Some projects in database have incomplete status, possibly from previous generation failures

ui_bugs.issue: Emergent Badge overlays the floating mic button in bottom right corner, preventing click interaction

issues: Missing data-testid attributes on interactive elements - affects automated testing

action_items: OPTIONAL: Fix Emergent Badge z-index or position to prevent overlapping the floating voice assistant button
RECOMMENDED: Add data-testid attributes to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, dropdowns) for automated testing
OPTIONAL: Clean up old projects with 'error' or 'in-progress' status in database
critical_code_review_comments: Voice dictation (VoiceInput.jsx) works but depends on Web Speech API - only works in Chrome/Chromium browsers
All form elements lack data-testid attributes - consider adding for better testability
Project creation with AI code generation is working correctly with GPT-5.1 fallback system

success_rate.frontend: 95% (All critical flows working, minor overlay issue with floating assistant)

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Calculator_App project during testing (can be deleted if needed)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features working: login/auth, project creation with AI code generation (GPT-5.1), web scraper, voice commands API. The floating voice assistant popup is blocked by Emergent badge overlay. Test files created at /app/backend/tests/test_api.py
